'''[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Dondo Foth''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. During the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]], he and his crew were the first to discover the incoming [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] fleet from [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]].
